cover.era_chip: 朝鮮 前期 · 性理學
cover.subtitle:
이를 따른 영남,
기를 따른 기호.
cover.imagePrompt: Joseon folk minhwa + genre-painting tones. Hanji beige, ink-black, crimson, navy. Scene: TWO Joseon scholars in white dopo and black gat seated facing each other at a low desk, with open books and brushes between them, debating philosophy. Behind them: a folding screen showing ink mountain landscape, and a tall white porcelain (baekja) vase on a stand. Soft natural light through hanji paper window. Composition: contemplative, parallel scholarly authority. Color: hanji beige + ink-black + warm amber accents + soft white porcelain highlight. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_headline:
"성학십도는 이황, 성학집요는 이이"
저서를 인물에 묶을 것.
outro.tip_body: 심화에서는 이기호발설=이황, 기발이승일도설=이이의 학설을 구분해야 한다. 안견=몽유도원도, 강희안=고사관수도, 신사임당=초충도로 그림 작가도 함께 기억할 것.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized white porcelain (baekja) jar with simple ink-blue accent, and to the left a small open book icon suggesting Seonghak-sipdo. Cream #F2EDE3 base + ink-blue #1E3A5F accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
